'''fozhagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:buccohypophysial|buccohypophysial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:buccohypophysial|buccohypophysial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fozhagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhagithi|fozhagithi]] || [[word:fozhagiji|fozhagiji]] || [[word:fozhagishi|fozhagishi]] || [[word:fozhagiki|fozhagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhaguthuthu|fozhaguthuthu]] || [[word:fozhagujuju|fozhagujuju]] || [[word:fozhagushushu|fozhagushushu]] || [[word:fozhagukuku|fozhagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhaguthu|fozhaguthu]] || [[word:fozhaguju|fozhaguju]] || [[word:fozhagushu|fozhagushu]] || [[word:fozhaguku|fozhaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhagufthuf|fozhagufthuf]] || [[word:fozhagufjuf|fozhagufjuf]] || [[word:fozhagufshuf|fozhagufshuf]] || [[word:fozhagufkuf|fozhagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhagethe|fozhagethe]] || [[word:fozhageje|fozhageje]] || [[word:fozhageshe|fozhageshe]] || [[word:fozhageke|fozhageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhagothotho|fozhagothotho]] || [[word:fozhagojojo|fozhagojojo]] || [[word:fozhagoshosho|fozhagoshosho]] || [[word:fozhagokoko|fozhagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhagotho|fozhagotho]] || [[word:fozhagojo|fozhagojo]] || [[word:fozhagosho|fozhagosho]] || [[word:fozhagoko|fozhagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhagofthof|fozhagofthof]] || [[word:fozhagofjof|fozhagofjof]] || [[word:fozhagofshof|fozhagofshof]] || [[word:fozhagofkof|fozhagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhagïfthïf|fozhagïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfjïf|fozhagïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfshïf|fozhagïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfkïf|fozhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhagïfthïfthïf|fozhagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfjïfjïf|fozhagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfshïfshïf|fozhagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfkïfkïf|fozhagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhagïfthïf|fozhagïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfjïf|fozhagïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfshïf|fozhagïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfkïf|fozhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhagïfthïf|fozhagïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfjïf|fozhagïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfshïf|fozhagïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhagïfkïf|fozhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhagæthæ|fozhagæthæ]] || [[word:fozhagæjæ|fozhagæjæ]] || [[word:fozhagæshæ|fozhagæshæ]] || [[word:fozhagækæ|fozhagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhagathatha|fozhagathatha]] || [[word:fozhagajaja|fozhagajaja]] || [[word:fozhagashasha|fozhagashasha]] || [[word:fozhagakaka|fozhagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhagatha|fozhagatha]] || [[word:fozhagaja|fozhagaja]] || [[word:fozhagasha|fozhagasha]] || [[word:fozhagaka|fozhagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhagafthaf|fozhagafthaf]] || [[word:fozhagafjaf|fozhagafjaf]] || [[word:fozhagafshaf|fozhagafshaf]] || [[word:fozhagafkaf|fozhagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fozhagasha|fozhagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhagshësha|fozhagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhagrosha|fozhagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhagmusha|fozhagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhagyasha|fozhagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhagnkshësha|gofozhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhagnkrosha|gofozhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhagnkmusha|gofozhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhagnkyasha|gofozhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fozhazhagasha|fozhazhagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhazhagshësha|fozhazhagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhazhagrosha|fozhazhagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhazhagmusha|fozhazhagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhazhagyasha|fozhazhagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhazhagnkshësha|gofozhazhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhazhagnkrosha|gofozhazhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhazhagnkmusha|gofozhazhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhazhagnkyasha|gofozhazhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fezhægasha|fezhægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fezhægshësha|fezhægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fezhægrosha|fezhægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fezhægmusha|fezhægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fezhægyasha|fezhægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofezhægnkshësha|gofezhægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofezhægnkrosha|gofezhægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofezhægnkmusha|gofezhægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofezhægnkyasha|gofezhægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fozhfagasha|fozhfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhfagshësha|fozhfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhfagrosha|fozhfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhfagmusha|fozhfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhfagyasha|fozhfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhfagnkshësha|gofozhfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhfagnkrosha|gofozhfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhfagnkmusha|gofozhfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhfagnkyasha|gofozhfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
